title: quercus pyrenaica
intro: Quercus pyrenaica, also known as the Pyrenean oak or Pyrenean sessile oak, is a deciduous tree species native to the Pyrenees mountains in Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus pyrenaica include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The bark and leaves of the tree are used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to make teas, capsules, and other supplements.
